name: hoverFlip
purpose: Hover-Mikrointeraktion — das Element klappt beim Ueberfahren in 3D um (rotateY; GPU-beschleunigt).
template:
{{css target}} { transition: transform {{css params.duration}}s cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1); }
{{css target}}:hover { transform: perspective(600px) rotateY({{css params.degrees}}deg); }
